# Emilia Tjernström

> Personal academic website of Emilia Tjernström, Associate Professor of Economics at Macquarie Business School. Research in development economics: technology adoption, heterogeneity, air quality measurement in sub-Saharan Africa.

## Papers with LLM-friendly bundles

Each bundle contains an orientation file (llms.txt), the full text in markdown (paper.md), the bibliography (references.bib), and figures.

- [Air Quality in Sub-Saharan Africa: Measurement Issues and Empirical Challenges](https://emiliatjernstrom.com/assets/llms/aq_ssa/llms.txt): forthcoming, Annual Review of Resource Economics, Vol. 18 (2026). Full text: https://emiliatjernstrom.com/assets/llms/aq_ssa/paper.md

## Other pages

- [Publications](https://emiliatjernstrom.com/research/): all papers with abstracts and PDF links
- [CV](https://emiliatjernstrom.com/assets/pdf/Tjernstrom-CV.pdf)
